2. **Close button**: Screenshot has X button in top right. Current code has X button in top left.

3. **Badges/Labels**: Screenshot shows a gold "INVESTMENT" badge at bottom left, and "ACTIVE" status badge on the right. Current code has badges: FEATURED, PROJECT REEL, INVESTMENT. No "ACTIVE" badge.

   Current code shows:

5. **Metrics**: Screenshot shows:

   Current code has these in `metricRow`. Good.

8. **Right rail**: Screenshot shows heart, comment, bookmark, share. Current code has heart, comment, share, save, follow, more, mute. The screenshot shows heart, comment, bookmark, share. So the order/content slightly differs but mostly matches.

9. **Colors**: The screenshot is clearly the IVX palette: black background, gold (#FFD700) accents. The current `colors.ts` uses correct colors.

```ts
function parseVideoTitle(video: FeedVideo): { title: string; location: string | null; tourLabel: string } {
  const raw = video.title ?? video.deal?.title ?? 'IVX Holdings';
  const locationMatch = raw.match(/(.+?)\s*[—–]\s*([^,]+,\s*[A-Z]{2})/);
  if (locationMatch) {
    return { title: locationMatch[1].trim(), location: locationMatch[2].trim(), tourLabel: 'Property Tour' };
  }
  const tourMatch = raw.match(/(.+?)\s*[—–]\s*(.+)/);
  if (tourMatch) {
    const tour = tourMatch[2].trim();
    const isLocation = /,\s*[A-Z]{2}/.test(tour);
    return { title: tourMatch[1].trim(), location: isLocation ? tour : null, tourLabel: isLocation ? 'Property Tour' : tour };
  }
  return { title: raw, location: null, tourLabel: 'Property Tour' };
}
```

For "Casa Rosario — Property Tour", it wouldn't match the location regex, then would match the tour regex: title="Casa Rosario", location=null, tourLabel="Property Tour". Good.

For no dash: title=raw, location=null, tourLabel="Property Tour".
